title: Multiple Instances
content:
To launch multiple minecraft instances enable the following settings.
Settings > Launcher Behavior > Keep Launcher Open
This will keep the launcher open and you will be able to Launch QFS3 again or even under a different Minecraft account.
author: Waltinho

title: Resolved Multiplayer Servers
content:
Servers now connect to their respected names

• QFS - Main Server
• Flatworld - Builder Server
• Test - Test Server
author: Waltinho

title: Ongoing Testing
content: Things are getting better with every update. Launch is near (I hope)
author: Waltinho

title: Welcome to QFS3
